name: Brian's Spicey Fig Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onions, carrots, and figs.
2. Place all ingredients in a blender.
3. Blend until smooth.
4. Serve tasty, slightly sweet, and with just the right heat to not scare away the neighbors.
Note: Brian's Spicey Fig Sauce is spicy, so use caution when serving it to those who are sensitive to heat.
